findings.evidence: `rg -n "^import|structure StronglyContinuousSemigroup|def StronglyContinuousSemigroup\.resolvent|resolventRightInv|ImproperIntegrals|ExpDecay|Bochner" code/TauCeti/Analysis/Semigroups/Basic.lean` hits imports at lines 10-14, basic structures at lines 102 and 116, and resolvent API at lines 522, 880, and 895 in the same file.
findings.fix: Keep `Basic.lean` to the foundational semigroup/generator API and move the resolvent construction, shift identities, resolvent-domain/right-inverse theorems, and contraction resolvent corollaries to a later file such as `Semigroups/Resolvent.lean` importing `Basic.lean`.
findings.issue: `Basic.lean` defines the Laplace resolvent and Hille-Yosida interface, so importing the basic structures also imports Bochner/improper-integral theory.

summary: The semigroup material is in the intended top-level directory, but `Basic.lean` is carrying the later Laplace-resolvent/Hille-Yosida layer and its heavy measure-theory imports.
